response:
[Julian wants to buy a new book that costs $8. He already has $3 saved up. How many weeks will he need to save to buy the book if he adds $1 to his savings each week?]

[Calculate the amount needed: 8 - 3 = 5]

[Divide the amount needed by the weekly savings: 5 / 1 = 5]

[He will need to save for 5 weeks]

[Answer: 5]
